title: Enderman Overhaul Pearls 2 MC Pearls
description: This Datapack adds a Crafting recipe to turn Enderpearls from Enderman Overhaul into basic Minecraft Enderpearls
body:
This Datapack adds a Crafting recipe to "wash" Enderpearls from Enderman Overhaul into basic Minecraft Enderpearls using Lapiz and Soap.

This Datapack currently only works for 1.20 and 1.20.1,

If you need a different version feel free to go into the code to change 1 number.
[How to do that (look for "Data pack formats")
](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Tutorials/Creating_a_data_pack#Pack_format)

NOTE: LINKED WEBSITE IS NOT MINE, INFO ON IT WAS USED TO MAKE THIS
